sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires timeout handling for unavailable recordings but does not define retry count or backoff.
decisionTaken: Use phase2-recording-fetch-retry-190.v1 with four attempts, 30 second fetch timeout, and 30/120/300/900 second retry backoff before recording_missing manual review.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It preserves recording availability as an evidence-preparation concern and blocks routine promotion when audio remains unavailable.
operationalRisk: A slow provider could enter manual review before the asset becomes available.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update recordingFetchTimeoutRetryLaw, 190_recording_fetch_retry_backoff_matrix.csv, and migration check constraints if live provider SLA evidence changes.
